name: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum
short_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Raspberry Rum is a flavoured white rum with a crisp, sweet-tart raspberry profile. It combines the clean character of white rum with bright berry flavour for a tangy, mouth-watering taste. Light and refreshing in style, it suits easy mixed drinks and soda serves, especially when you want a fruity rum with a lively, zesty edge. Best used in simple highballs, citrus-forward cocktails, or rum-based twists on classic refreshers. Flavor tags: raspberry, sweet-tart, citrus, fruity, crisp, refreshing, mixer-friendly.
display_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.

evidence_fields.short_description: A crisp blend of white rum and raspberry flavours.
